markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees and share GrowthX's vision, strategy, and market opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an AI-powered platform for content creation and knowledge work, with a current focus on editorial content and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [The company has raised $12M in Series A funding and is targeting $10.9M ARR by end of H1 2023](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [GrowthX's unique approach combines expert oversight with AI workflows, creating valuable "frontier data" while delivering client outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [The addressable market is massive, with just 27,000 potential clients representing a $3.2B annual opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

## Topics

### Company Vision and Market Opportunity

  - [GrowthX aims to increase knowledge worker productivity by 100x using AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [$500B+ annual content market opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Unique value proposition: delivering outcomes vs. just providing tools](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [27,000 potential enterprise/mid-market clients from SEMrush alone represent $3.2B annual opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Current Traction and Growth

  - [40+ clients with avg. $150K ACV, 6.2M ARR (as of meeting date)](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - Most deals close in \<30 days, often after just one 30-minute meeting
  - [Notable clients/investors: Ramp, Webflow, Bolt.new](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Projecting 10.9M ARR by end of H1 2023](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [AI-powered workflows with expert oversight for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Codified knowledge work processes represented in code for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Internal platform runs workflows efficiently, with plans to expose APIs](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content and programmatic SEO, expanding to other services](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Business Model and Strategy

  - [Started with services to generate "frontier data" while getting paid](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Three-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
    1.  Build internal platform (current)
    2.  Expose APIs and expand services
    3.  Apply to other knowledge work domains
  - [High margins due to large deal sizes, no marketing spend yet](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

### Team and Culture

  - [Emphasis on learning, feedback, and iterating quickly](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [Building for internal use first, then scaling to clients](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Welcoming environment for diverse perspectives and experiences](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New employees to continue onboarding and familiarize themselves with GrowthX's platform and processes](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Team to focus on reaching 100+ clients this year](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Explore expansion into additional work streams and service types](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Continue gathering feedback to improve internal tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3KauW1xDwvygNECx45oy2B5Uu7QVL2x1?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)
